input.string: Summarize and cleanup this raw input taken from user's notes. Clean it up and turn it into a practical and doable idea and evaluate its strengths and weaknesses and provide suggestions. Add a summary at the end explaining why your cleaned up version is a good choice.

input.systemPrompt: Compare and evaluate both ideas and take the strong points to form a coherent proper report. Use the idea source as the baseline for accuracy and context for the Idea 1 and 2's output. Present it in a clear, understandable report and no need to mention Idea 1 and Idea 2 as the user will have no idea about it. Only your report will be presented externally so provide the already combined information. Include evaluation and criticism of the strengths, weaknesses, and overall details, and highlight good features and things that are 100% surely not needed or even too dangerous to be included (if any).

meta.name: Idea Generator Report
meta.description: Evaluates and summarizes your raw idea notes via ensemble reasoning
